detail: dedup: all 4 open P2s have distinct root causes (test-gap, warn-once-flag, catch-block-discard, test-table-incomplete)
escalation: all 4 P2s reviewed against P1/P0 criteria; 0 warrant elevation
verdict: PASS (hasAdvisories=true) — 0 P0, 0 P1, 4 open P2, convergence achieved

reason: Cache invalidation fires unconditionally from memory-save.ts:2583 and memory-bulk-delete.ts:149,256 regardless of SPECKIT_GRAPH_CHANNEL_PRESERVATION value. The consuming path (shouldPreserveGraph → getEntityDensityScore) is flag-guarded at query-router.ts:233 and null-safe at entity-density.ts:105-109.

When safeGetDb() returns null, getEntityDensityScore(query, null) calls refreshIfStale(null) which clears cache and returns; score defaults to 0. Entity-density override stays inactive. Route falls through to complexity-tier defaults.
routing-telemetry.ts uses in-process recentDecisions[] array; entity-density.ts uses module-level cachedTerms Set. No shared state, no cross-contamination.
